description: A Java project 'CommandPatternApp' is open in Eclipse. The file src/com/example/commands/CommandSystem.java contains seven type definitions: Command (interface), UndoableCommand (interface), TextDocument (class), InsertTextCommand (class), DeleteTextCommand (class), MacroCommand (class), and CommandInvoker (class). Extract each type into its own .java file in the com.example.commands package. Ensure the project compiles with zero errors and that CommandSystem.java is either deleted or contains at most one type. Save the console output from running Main.java to /home/ga/refactored_output.txt.
